ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Documentation for the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heuristics" (
  "heuristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heuristic */,
  "heuristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the heuristic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the heuristic */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the heuristic */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the heuristic */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Documentation for the heuristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heuristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the configuration belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_configurations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used */,
  "heuristic" TEXT /* Heuristic method applied */,
  "final_state" TEXT /* Final state of the solution */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the solution */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken to compute the solution */,
  "generated_nodes" INTEGER /* Number of nodes generated during computation */,
  "max_memory_usage" INTEGER /* Maximum memory usage during computation */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the run (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies for the run (e.g., input files, external resources) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the run (e.g., experiment, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_heuristic FOREIGN KEY ("heuristic") REFERENCES heuristics ("heuristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_run_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Time the status was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_run_status_history_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, megabytes) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the metric (e.g., maximum allowed value) */,
  "acceptable_range" TEXT /* Acceptable range for the metric (e.g., minimum and maximum values) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
